name: drupilot
description: Port Drupal 9/10 modules and themes to Drupal 11: viability assessment, minimal port (drupal-rector + AI digests rules), optional full "Drupal 11 way" refactor, the complete PHPUnit suite in DDEV (Unit/Kernel/Functional/FunctionalJavascript), and Drupal.org contribution (issue fork + Merge Request, or legacy patch).
